# Urn
type=event
location=14,19,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,14,19,269
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_object.ogg
tooltip=Urn

tooltip=Crate

[event]
# Mastite pillar regen
type=event
location=5,5,3,3
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=2s
power=378
power_path=6,6
repeat=true
